default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Swoogo's content strategy and partnership continuation with fwd.digital for 2025.](https://fathom.video/share/Ny_2Xx7-vqbMHtw_4urt-XD_LEftvXVd?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Swoogo wants more focus on ICP keywords (event registration, event management) vs. broad terms like "party planning"](https://fathom.video/share/Ny_2Xx7-vqbMHtw_4urt-XD_LEftvXVd?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [fwd.digital achieved impressive results: 5x traffic increase, ranking for 10,000 keywords (243 in top 3) in 4 months](https://fathom.video/share/Ny_2Xx7-vqbMHtw_4urt-XD_LEftvXVd?tab=summary&timestamp=411.0)
  - [Agreement reached on 3-month extension to prove value with ICP-focused content (40 blogs on registration)](https://fathom.video/share/Ny_2Xx7-vqbMHtw_4urt-XD_LEftvXVd?tab=summary&timestamp=741.0)
  - [Potential to eliminate Ahrefs cost ($3k/mo) by transitioning fully to fwd.digital's proprietary tools](https://fathom.video/share/Ny_2Xx7-vqbMHtw_4urt-XD_LEftvXVd?tab=summary&timestamp=1194.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Alignment

  - [Swoogo wants shift from broad keywords (e.g., party planning) to ICP-specific (event registration, event management)](https://fathom.video/share/Ny_2Xx7-vqbMHtw_4urt-XD_LEftvXVd?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [fwd.digital explains broad approach built domain authority, now ready to target more specific terms](https://fathom.video/share/Ny_2Xx7-vqbMHtw_4urt-XD_LEftvXVd?tab=summary&timestamp=1069.0)
  - [40 new blogs focused on registration keywords planned to test ICP-specific impact](https://fathom.video/share/Ny_2Xx7-vqbMHtw_4urt-XD_LEftvXVd?tab=summary&timestamp=741.0)

### Partnership Terms

  - [Swoogo hesitant to commit long-term, prefers 3-month extension to prove ICP keyword value](https://fathom.video/share/Ny_2Xx7-vqbMHtw_4urt-XD_LEftvXVd?tab=summary&timestamp=1101.0)
  - [fwd.digital pushes for 6-month commitment, emphasizing need for stability to invest in tech/team](https://fathom.video/share/Ny_2Xx7-vqbMHtw_4urt-XD_LEftvXVd?tab=summary&timestamp=1166.0)
  - [Compromise reached: 3-month extension with clear expectations on ICP keyword improvement](https://fathom.video/share/Ny_2Xx7-vqbMHtw_4urt-XD_LEftvXVd?tab=summary&timestamp=1161.0)

### Results & Metrics

  - [5x traffic increase in 4 months (1,900 to 10,000 ranking keywords)](https://fathom.video/share/Ny_2Xx7-vqbMHtw_4urt-XD_LEftvXVd?tab=summary&timestamp=611.0)
  - [Top 3 rankings increased from 38 to 243 keywords](https://fathom.video/share/Ny_2Xx7-vqbMHtw_4urt-XD_LEftvXVd?tab=summary&timestamp=816.0)
  - [Key wins: 1st page ranking for "corporate events", improved party planning ranking (80 to 60)](https://fathom.video/share/Ny_2Xx7-vqbMHtw_4urt-XD_LEftvXVd?tab=summary&timestamp=871.0)
  - [Swoogo wants similar improvements for "event registration" and "event management" keywords](https://fathom.video/share/Ny_2Xx7-vqbMHtw_4urt-XD_LEftvXVd?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

### Tool Optimization

  - [Potential to eliminate $3k/mo Ahrefs cost by fully transitioning to fwd.digital's tools](https://fathom.video/share/Ny_2Xx7-vqbMHtw_4urt-XD_LEftvXVd?tab=summary&timestamp=1194.0)
  - [fwd.digital CTO built keyword clustering tool processing 10k keywords in 1 minute](https://fathom.video/share/Ny_2Xx7-vqbMHtw_4urt-XD_LEftvXVd?tab=summary&timestamp=1209.0)

### Budget Considerations

  - [Swoogo spending $13k/mo ($10k fwd.digital, $3k Ahrefs)](https://fathom.video/share/Ny_2Xx7-vqbMHtw_4urt-XD_LEftvXVd?tab=summary&timestamp=638.0)
  - [Goal to reduce paid search spend by improving organic rankings](https://fathom.video/share/Ny_2Xx7-vqbMHtw_4urt-XD_LEftvXVd?tab=summary&timestamp=630.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Execute 3-month extension focusing on ICP keywords (event registration, management)](https://fathom.video/share/Ny_2Xx7-vqbMHtw_4urt-XD_LEftvXVd?tab=summary&timestamp=1226.0)
  - [Deliver 40 blogs on registration topics over the holiday break](https://fathom.video/share/Ny_2Xx7-vqbMHtw_4urt-XD_LEftvXVd?tab=summary&timestamp=1418.0)
  - [fwd.digital to engage with Ahrefs about pausing/canceling Swoogo's account](https://fathom.video/share/Ny_2Xx7-vqbMHtw_4urt-XD_LEftvXVd?tab=summary&timestamp=1194.0)
  - [Reassess partnership in 3 months based on ICP keyword ranking improvements](https://fathom.video/share/Ny_2Xx7-vqbMHtw_4urt-XD_LEftvXVd?tab=summary&timestamp=1356.0)
  - [fwd.digital to help communicate value/results to Swoogo leadership team](https://fathom.video/share/Ny_2Xx7-vqbMHtw_4urt-XD_LEftvXVd?tab=summary&timestamp=1438.0)

action_items.description: Regroup w/ team re contract terms; propose 3mo or 6mo w/ Ahrefs costs covered
Contact Ahrefs to pause service for Swoogo; cite budget reconsideration for next year
Brief team on refocusing efforts on event registration/mgmt keywords; aim for 80-60 ranking improvement
Review 40 registration-focused blogs delivered over break; assess impact on rankings
